english translation text: Move forwards & backwards seven times, saying...

arabic text: إِنَّا لِلّهِ وَإِنَّـا إِلَيْهِ رَاجِعُونَ رِضًا بِقَضَائِهِ وَتَسْلِيْمًا لِأَمْرِهِ
english translation text:
Surely we come from Allah, and to Him we shall return (2:156).
Being pleased with His decree, and submitting to His orders.
600

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
